evidence_summary: Establish the visual identity of Quadling Country through a dominant red color palette and transition the group from travel-worn exhaustion to domestic comfort within a farmhouse setting.
The group lands in the lush, red-themed Country of the Quadlings. They meet a kind farmer's wife who provides them with food and rest, allowing them to recover from their journey.
The group arrives looking exhausted and travel-worn against a red backdrop.
The group is resting and eating, visibly more comfortable.
Arrival at the homestead followed by receiving food and rest from Farmer's Wife.
